name: Coq Au Vin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rinse chicken and pat dry.
3. Melt 2 tablespoons margarine in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
4. Add garlic powder and herbs; stir together for 30 seconds.
5. Dredge chicken in flour.
6. Add chicken to the skillet and cook until brown on both sides. Remove to a small casserole; set aside.
7. Add remaining 2 tablespoons margarine to the skillet.
8. Add mushrooms and onions; sauté until golden.
9. Add to the casserole.
10. Pour wine into the skillet and scrape up any browned pieces.
11. Pour over chicken.
12. Bake, covered, for 50 to 60 minutes or until tender.
